_comment: 074: pre-registered gate for the OOF re-validation of two-gamma (048) / stage discount (049). Fixed BEFORE any OOF result is generated (III). verdict is tri-value (ADOPT/REJECT/NO_DECISION) per the 073 contract; a distribution transfer-check mismatch forces NO_DECISION. Do not edit after OOF results exist.

ece._comment: measured on strictly-later OOF blocks only (never the prequential fit sample). Banded per 073 (prob/odds/p/q + common tail).

verdict._comment: 048 re-validation: ADOPT requires calibrated-stage ECE non-inferior vs raw with CI upper < margin; REJECT if confidently worse; NO_DECISION if underpowered OR transfer-check mismatch.

transfer_check._comment: OOF vs full-history score distribution mismatch => NO_DECISION/fallback (codex). Pinned BEFORE any OOF result (III): two-sample KS on the raw pre-sigmoid scores; mismatch when the KS distance exceeds ks_distance_max. Result-blind (scores only, no labels). Fixed method + numeric cutoff so the NO_DECISION trigger is fully pre-registered.

prequential._comment: each fold's two-gamma/lambda is fit on PRIOR OOF folds only; the fit fold is excluded from the eval CI.

development_evidence_note: 2008-2026 is development evidence, NOT confirmatory (073 US4). A confirmatory verdict needs the DORMANT prospective holdout + unused data.
